title: Rich Content Management System with Advanced Filtering and Analytics

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Rich Content Management System with Advanced Filtering and Analytics

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`
* `#090a0f`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<g id='header'>
<rect x='10' y='10' rx='5' width='150' height='50' fill='#C06C88'/>
<text x='15' y='35' fill='white' font-size='24'>CMS Dashboard</text>
</g>
<g id='content' transform='translate(200, 50)'>
<g id='cards'>
<g id='card-1' transform='translate(0, 0)'><rect x='10' y='10' rx='5' width='150' height='100' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='15' y='35' fill='black'>Card 1</text></g>
<g id='card-2' transform='translate(0, 120)'><rect x='10' y='10' rx='5' width='150' height='100' fill='#C06C88'/><text x='15' y='35' fill='black'>Card 2</text></g>
</g>
<g id='filter' transform='translate(0, 220)'><rect x='10' y='10' rx='5' width='200' height='30' fill='#411C56'/><text x='15' y='30' fill='white' font-size='18'>Filter by Category</text></g>
<g id='analytics' transform='translate(250, 10)'><rect x='10' y='10' rx='5' width='150' height='150' fill='#B7D7CD'/><text x='15' y='35' fill='black'>Analytics Chart</text></g>
<g id='footer' transform='translate(0, 250)'><rect x='10' y='10' rx='5' width='380' height='20' fill='#090a0f'/><text x='15' y='30' fill='white' font-size='14'>Copyright 2024</text></g>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must implement interactive filtering with category selection and card updating.
Must render real-time analytics chart with sorting and hover effects.
Must use only specified colors and maintain the exact layout and positioning.

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Rich Content Management System with Advanced Filtering and Analytics

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate how closely the layout, colors, and positioning match the target visual mockup.
Verify interactive state updates, category selection, card updating, and real-time analytics rendering.
Review code cleanliness, proper semantic elements, and efficient state use.
